doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the official EEOC Compliance Manual pertains to Retaliation, and the EEOC has not issued a "Section 8" dedicated to Age Discrimination in 2018.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: Section 8 of the actual EEOC Compliance Manual covers Retaliation, not Age Discrimination, which is primarily addressed under Section 2 (Threshold Issues) and specific ADEA guidance documents.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: Section 8 of the official EEOC Compliance Manual pertains to Retaliation, and the EEOC has not issued a "Section 8" dedicated to Age Discrimination in 2018.
